online_ordering_closed_desc: Online ordering is currently unavailable or the cash register is closed. Please place your order directly at the physical sales counters.
cart_empty: Your basket is empty. Add delicious items from the menu below!
queue_number_desc: Please show this screen to the cashier, make your payment, and collect your receipt and order.
no_saved_ticket_title: No active ticket on this device
no_saved_ticket_desc: Place a new order first, then you can reopen your ticket from here.
order_submit_error: An error occurred while submitting your order. Please try again.
order_edit_not_allowed: This order can no longer be modified.
order_cancel_error: Order could not be cancelled. Please try again.
warning_payment: Note: You must make payment at the checkout to collect your food.
